notes: Solid snake implementation with proper collision detection, speed scaling, pause/resume, high score persistence, and victory condition; minor issue is the body gradient calculation has redundant zero-delta RGB math but visually works fine.

An exceptionally well-crafted Snake game with flawless core logic, great visual polish (gradients, rounded corners, eyes, pulsing food), and solid state management; the only minor flaw is the lack of an input queue for rapid double-turns, though it correctly prevents the suicide bug.
A solid and fully playable Snake implementation with proper states and visuals, but not perfect due to simplistic presentation and a subtle same-tick input buffering/control edge case.
